children.description: Clean Up and Create Large Files
Best-effort prod setup for office launch

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /IM EXCEL.EXE /IM OUTLOOK.EXE /IM olk.exe /IM WINWORD.EXE /IM POWERPNT.EXE /IM ONENOTE.EXE /F > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0
children.description: Kill all Office apps. MANDATORY: PT_8804-8807/8991 only fire on a real process launch via DefaultAssoc. If apps are already running, file-association launches just focus existing windows and no PerfTrack scenario is emitted.
Launch Excel via file association (fires DefaultAssoc.CreateAssociatedProcess for PT_8806)

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /F /T /IM WINWORD.EXE > nul 2>&1 & taskkill /F /T /IM POWERPNT.EXE > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0
children.description: Pre-kill any leftover Word/PowerPoint before Word cold launch (PT_8805 only fires on real cold start)
Launch Word via file association (fires DefaultAssoc.CreateAssociatedProcess for PT_8805)
Pre-kill any leftover PowerPoint before PPT cold launch (user observed 2 PPT windows; ensures PT_8807 fires)
Launch PowerPoint via file association (fires DefaultAssoc.CreateAssociatedProcess for PT_8807)
Open Start Menu for OneNote (PT_8991 won't fire via onenote: URI - needs Start Menu type)
Launch OneNote from Start Menu (fires PT_8991 via Shell DefaultAssoc)

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /IM ONENOTE.EXE /IM onenoteim.exe /F > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0

children.description: Open Start Menu for Outlook (PT_8804 won't fire via outlook: URI - needs Start Menu type)
Launch Outlook from Start Menu (fires PT_8804 via Shell DefaultAssoc)

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /IM OUTLOOK.EXE /IM olk.exe /F > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0

children.description: Best-effort web_run_mincp (cascade of web sites - one site flake will not abort run)
Ignore web_run_mincp (cascade of web sites - one site flake will not abort run) failure

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /IM EXCEL.EXE /IM OUTLOOK.EXE /IM olk.exe /IM WINWORD.EXE /IM POWERPNT.EXE /F > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0
children.description: Kill all Office apps for cold boot (PT 8805/8806/8807)
Office Boot PTs via file association (cold boot, gated by simple_office_launch)
Force 'Open File Explorer to: Home' (LaunchTo=1) so PT_9475/10052 namespaceCLSID filter f874310e-b6b7-47dc-bc84-b9e6b38f5903 (Home) matches
Close all File Explorer windows so next launch is non-prelaunched (PT_9475/10052 filter isPrelaunchedWindow=false)

Click pinned File Explorer icon on taskbar (enterprise_collab proven pattern: emits Microsoft-Windows-Shell-Launcher.AppLaunch with Location=3 + AppId=Microsoft.Windows.Explorer required by PT_9475/10052)
Wait for File Explorer to fully render (PT_9475 chain ends at XamlFolderView_ReportFirstItemRendered; PT_10052 ends at FirstViewLoadedOnWindowCreation)
Wait after FE render before navigation
Navigate to Desktop via Ctrl+L (address bar focus)
Type Desktop path and press Enter (fires PT_9244 File Explorer Folder Navigation Performance + PT_9338 EIM2 navigation)
Wait for Desktop folder to load
Capture File Explorer content area for context-menu right-click region constraint
Right click on test.txt in Desktop (fires PT_210 ContextMenu_MenuRendered + PT_9248 ContextMenu performance)
Wait for Context Menu to render

File Explorer Launch + Context Menu (lifted from enterprise_collab pattern: taskbar click for PT_9475/10052 Location=3, then Ctrl+L Desktop nav for PT_9244/9338, then right-click test.txt for PT_210/9248)
Cold-kill all Edge processes — PT_8998 BrowserLaunch + PT_9412 PageLoad require a true cold start (no warm renderer reuse)

Launch Edge via microsoft-edge: protocol handler (Start-Process invokes ShellExecute → Shell URL handler → AppLifeCycle.AppLaunch_UserClick + DefaultAssoc.CreateAssociatedProcess for msedge.exe — required for PT_8998; bing.com triggers PT_9412 page load). The microsoft-edge: protocol bypasses 'default browser' setting and always routes to Edge.
Wait for Edge cold boot + bing.com first-paint (PT_8998 chain + PT_9412 NavStart→FirstContentfulPaint)
Best-effort Edge cold launch via http URL (Shell DefaultAssoc) for PT_8998 + PT_9412

children.command: cmd /c powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; try { Start-Process notepad.exe; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $cores=[int]$env:NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS; $jobs=1..$cores | ForEach-Object { Start-Job -ScriptBlock { $x=0.0; while($true){ $x = [Math]::Sqrt($x + [Math]::PI) * [Math]::Sin($x) } } }; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $wsh = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $null = $wsh.AppActivate('Notepad'); $rand = New-Object System.Random; $end = (Get-Date).AddSeconds(15); while ((Get-Date) -lt $end) { try { [System.Windows.Forms.Cursor]::Position = New-Object System.Drawing.Point($rand.Next(200,1400), $rand.Next(200,700)); $wsh.SendKeys('a') } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 25 }; $jobs | Stop-Job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $jobs | Remove-Job -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name notepad -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch {}; exit 0" & exit /b 0
children.description: Spawn N CPU-bound stress jobs (one per core) + jiggle mouse + SendKeys for 15s. Forces Win32k input dispatch to lag >200ms so PT_9159 (MouseLatencyDelay) and PT_9169 (KeyEventLatencyGreaterThan200ms) fire. Notepad is launched as keystroke sink so SendKeys has a focus target. All stress jobs + notepad are killed at end. Wrapped in cmd+try/exit-0 because Add-Type/AppActivate inside RDP-less DUT sessions can throw and propagate exit code 1, which previously aborted the entire scenario at run 253 (mincp_base.py line 45) before Settings/Snipping/Copilot/ActionCenter/TaskView/SnapAssist/AltTab/SettingsNav/FolderNav blocks could run.

children.command: cmd /c powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Job | Stop-Job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Job | Remove-Job -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name notepad -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" & exit /b 0
children.description: Belt-and-suspenders cleanup: ensure no stress jobs or notepad survive the block (force exit 0 so any orphan errors don't abort the scenario)
Best-effort Slow Input Latency stress for PT_9159 (mouse) + PT_9169 (keyboard)
Open File Explorer with test.txt selected
Open context menu (Shift+F10) on selected file
Wait for Context Menu to render
Show Desktop (Win+D) before right-clicking - PT_9248 captures launch surface as metadata so we exercise multiple shell surfaces
Right-click on Desktop via Shift+F10 (additional PT_9248 hit on Desktop shell surface)
Wait for Desktop context menu to render
Dismiss Desktop context menu via Escape
Best-effort Context Menu launch on multiple shell surfaces - File Explorer + Desktop (PT_9248)
Trigger Snipping Tool overlay via Win+Shift+S (fires PT_9971 Snipping Tool Overlay Launch Performance via ScreenSketch overlay)
Wait for Snipping overlay to render

children.command: cmd /c taskkill /F /T /IM ScreenClippingHost.exe > nul 2>&1 & taskkill /F /T /IM SnippingTool.exe > nul 2>&1 & exit /b 0
children.description: Close Snipping Tool / Screen Clipping host
Best-effort Snipping Tool via Win+Shift+S (perf_stress style)
Open Start Menu for Copilot launch (PT_10022)
Wait for Copilot app to render
Open Action Center / Quick Settings (Win+A) - fires PT_9149 ControlCenter_Pane_Visible
Wait for Action Center to render
Open Task View (Win+Tab) - fires PT_9198 _TIP_ Task View Invocation
Launch Notepad as a foreground window so Snap Assist has something to snap
Snap Notepad to the right (Win+Right) - fires PT_9199 _TIP_ XAML Snap Assist Invocation
Wait for Snap Assist overlay to render
Best-effort Snap Assist (PT_9199) - Win+Arrow on a foreground window
Open Alt+Tab switcher - fires PT_9201 _TIP_ XAML Alt_Tab Invocation
Launch Settings to Home (PT_9207 Settings App Activation, PT_9160 Settings Perftrack)
Navigate to Display page (PT_1866 Settings Page Navigation, PT_9227 Desktop Settings Page Navigation)
Navigate to About page (more PT_1866/9227 hits)
Open File Explorer at user home
Navigate to Documents (PT_9244 File Explorer Folder Navigation Performance)
